description: Implement run configuration loading and validation in internal/config/. The Config struct holds all operational settings (repo path, base_ref, max_parallel, store config, merge strategy, etc.). Only the 'review' field can be overridden per-task. Implement Load, LoadWithDefaults, Validate, and ReviewModeForTask. MVP validation: store.backend must be 'jsonl', merge_strategy must be 'sequential'. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1f for the full struct and validation rules.
commit: feat(config): add run configuration model, loader, and validation
steps: Create internal/config/config.go with Config and StoreConfig structs matching docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1f

Implement LoadWithDefaults() *Config returning config with all defaults (repo='.', base_ref='main', branch_prefix='flywheel/', max_parallel=3, store.backend='jsonl', merge_strategy='sequential', review='agent', agent='claude-code', timeout='30m', max_retries=2, max_resolve_attempts=2)
Implement Load(path string) (*Config, error) that reads JSON, applies defaults for missing fields

Implement Validate(cfg *Config) error: reject empty repo, invalid merge_strategy (MVP: only 'sequential'), invalid store.backend (MVP: only 'jsonl'), invalid review value, max_parallel < 1, invalid timeout duration format
Implement ReviewModeForTask(cfg Config, taskReview string) string that returns task-level review if set, else config default
Create internal/config/config_test.go: test Load from JSON, test defaults applied, test validation rejects bad config, test ReviewModeForTask fallback
acceptance_criteria: LoadWithDefaults returns correct defaults for every field
Load parses JSON config and fills in defaults for omitted fields
Validate rejects unsupported backends with 'not yet implemented' error
Validate rejects unsupported merge strategies with 'not yet implemented' error
ReviewModeForTask returns task override when set, config default otherwise
